creator: marklmi26-fbsd@yahoo.com
text:
Note: Back on 2020-Jan-11 my test run on head -r356426
got similar results on armv7 (Cortex-A7), but not
everything repeated: the various ssp_test's did,
scanfloat_test did, and the various mincore_test's
did.

aarch64 (Cortex-A53/57/72) did not report any of these.
